violations.text: Observed dumpster side door and top cover open. Dumpster doors/cover shall be kept close after each use. PIC closed dumpster during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/20/2025

The vent in the walk-in freezer has a buildup of ice. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. PIC informed maintenance tech at time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 05/30/2025

Sausages and bacon strips were observed held at (100-114) degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Per PIC hot holding units over prep area are to be serviced. Maintenance tech serving units during time of inspection. Food items were voluntarily disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2025
Observed pretzel sliders and a chicken bacon stuffer with expiration date. PIC voluntary disposed of food items. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2025
Observed dumpster side door open. Dumpster doors shall be kept close after each use. PIC closed dumpster during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2025

The vent in the walk-in freezer has a buildup of ice. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. PIC informed Maintenace tech at time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 05/30/2025

Insect control devices were observed kept above areas of prep and equipment. Installation of the device over food preparation areas or in close proximity to exposed food and/or food-contact surfaces could allow dead insects and/or insect parts to be impelled by the electric charge, fall, or be blown from the device onto food or food-contact surfaces. New Violation. Correct By: 03/13/2024

The floor in the back area has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 03/13/2024

Employees' clothing or other personal belongings were observed stored in the front prep area. Lockers or other suitable facilities shall be used for the orderly storage of employees' clothing and other possessions. New Violation. Correct By: 03/06/2024

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Please email inspector proof of employee enrollment in a food safety course. New Violation. Correct By: 05/09/2023
Soap was not available at the hand-washing sinks in the kitchen. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. New Violation. Correct By: 05/09/2023
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quaternary ammonium sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 05/09/2023
The floor and shelves in the walk-in freezer have an accumulation of ice. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/09/2023
